titleStmt.title: SII 17.249: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 249. (A.R. No. 227 of 1904.) ŚIṄGAVARAM, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east base of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Raṅganātha temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti, Tirumagaḷ maruviya, etc., of Rājēndra II. The details of date cited in the body of this inscription, viz., Mēsha, ba. 3, Monday, Kēṭṭai, correspond to 1058 A.D., April 13, Monday, f.d.t. ·36, f.d.n. ·58.

It records the registration of the following gifts by the Peru[ṅguṟi]-pperumakkaḷ of Rājarāja-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya and a taṉiyūr in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, when they had assembled in the courtyard of god Śrī Rājarāja-viṇṇagar-Āḻvār, in the presence of Nambikōṭṭi Atirātra-yājiyār.

(a) A gift of 96 sheep for a perpetual lamp to god Paḷḷikoṇḍaruḷugiṟa Paramasu vāmigaḷ in Tiruppaṉṟikkuṉṟu, by Kāri Murugan alias Uttamaśōḻa . . . . [ḷaiyūr] Nāḍāḻvāṉ of Muḷḷūrppaḷḷi, a hamlet of the village, in expiation of the sin of having killed Kōdaṇḍaṉ Dēvan alias Ediriliśōḻa-kkaṟpūṇḍi-nāḍuḍaiyāṉ, the commander of Tāṉamaḍai Jaṉanātha-tterindavilligaḷ;
(b) gift of 24 (?) sheep for 1/4 of a perpetual lamp by a number of paḷḷis (?) for the merit of Paḷḷi Śāttaṉ Śūṟṟi who died in a hunting expedition;
(c) gift of 12 sheep collected from a number of Śrīvaishṇavas, for 1/8 of a perpetual lamp;
(d) gift of 12 sheep for 1/8 of a perpetual lamp by Kuppai Tiruvaraṅgaṉ, a maṉṟāḍi (shepherd);

(e) gift of sheep for two perpetual lamps by Vaikundaṉ Pichchan alias Rājarāja-pperiyaraiyaṉ of Ambūrppaḷḷi, a hamlet of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in expiation of the sin of having killed Āmūru[ḍaiyāṉ] Bhaṭṭaṉ Vichchādi . . . . ra Rājādhirāja-ttirumuṉaippāḍi-Nāḍāḻvāṉ and his brother Bhaṭṭaṉ Mādēvaṉ, when their adoptive father Paḷḷi Eḻuvaṉ . . . . . . . . [Karikā]laśōḻa-Āmūr-Nāḍāḻvān and his brothers complained about the same.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ maruviya ceṅkol vaḷavaṉ muṉṉor ceṉai piṉnatu vāka muṉ netireṉṟu Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamuṅ koṇṭu kol
lāpurattu jayastampam nāṭṭi Etiramar peṟātu Eṇṭicai nikaḻap paṟaiyatu kaṟaṅka perāṟṟaṅkarai koppattāhavamallaṉai Aṭaṟperuñ
ceṉai yellām porutu pāratunikaḻap pacumpiṇamākki Āhavamallaṉ puṟakkiṭṭoṭa Avaṉāṉaiyuṅ kutiraiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramu moṭ
ṭṭaka niraikaḷum vibhavamuṅ kaikkoṇṭu vijaiAbhiṣekam paṇṇi virasiṃhāsanattu viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakeśarivanmarāṉa Uṭai
yār śrīrājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu brahmadeya n=taṉiyūr śrīrājarājaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu peru
ṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Iyyāṭṭai meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyu tritiyaiyum peṟṟa tirukkeṭṭaināḷ pakal namakku mūlade
nāḷ śrīrājarāja viṇṇakar Āḻvār tirumuṟṟattiley kūṭi nammai Uṭaiya cakkaravartti Uṭaiyār śrīrājentradevar tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷa
paripālikkiṉṟa nampikoṭṭi Atirāttrayājiyārum Irukkap paṇitta Eḻuttu nammūrppiṭākai muḷḷurpaḷḷi kāri murukanāṉa Uttamacoḻa
ḷaiyūr nāṭāḻvāṉ tāṉamaṭai jaṉanātatterin=tavillikaḷukku nāyakaṅ kotaṇṭaṉ tevanāna Etirilicoḻak kaṟpūṇṭi nāṭuṭaiyāṉai
kkuttiṉa pakai keṭat tiruppaṉṟikkuṉṟil paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷukiṟa paramasvāmikaḷukku vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa veḷḷāṭu
toṇṇūṟṟāṟum veṭṭaiyil paṭṭa paḷḷicāttaṉ cūṟṟikku Ākap pala paḷḷikaḷ vaitta tiru nun=tāviḷakku kālukku viṭṭa veḷḷāṭu Iru
ṉālum śrīvayiṣṇavar palaraiyu miran=tu vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Araikkālukku viṭṭa veḷḷāṭu paṉṉireṇṭum maṉṟāṭi kuppai tiruvaraṅkaṉ vaitta tirunun=tāviḷak
rakkālukku viṭṭa veḷḷāṭu paṉṉiraṇṭum nammūrp piṭākai Ampūrppaḷḷi vaikun=taṉ piccanāṉa rājarājap periyaraiyaṉ tāṉ Āmūruṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ viccāti
ra rājādhirājat tirumuṉaippāṭi nāṭāḻvāṉaiyum Ivaṉ tampi paṭṭaṉ mātevaṉaiyum paṭak kuttiṉamaiyil Ivarkaḷai makaṉmaikkoṇṭa paḷḷi Eḻuvaṉ
karikālacoḻa Āmurnāṭāḻvānu n=tampimārum Ippakai yeṉṟu koḷḷap pakai tirvataṟku vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku viṭṭa veḷḷāṭu nū
ntrātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavaṉavāka śilālekai ceyvittom peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom karaippon=tu paṇittār śrīkun=tavaicceri vā
somayājiyār paṇiyāl Eṇṇāyirapperuṅkāviti Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 17.249 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
